localizations.title: In Pursuit of the White Rabbit
localizations.hiddenObject_2: This M has a weird shape. What is hiding in its shadow?
localizations.hiddenObject_3: The smoke of the caterpillar will unveil a secret.
localizations.code_5210: You go through the forest to reach the Queen's castle. Turn the page to Chapter III. Discard the "THIS WAY" card.
localizations.code_2135: No sooner was the rabbit trail found again than the latter jumped to the bottom of the rabbit-hole, Alice slipped into this hole which suddenly widened.
localizations.code_2153: These are the correct numbers but not the sequence of the story.
localizations.code_2513: These are the correct numbers but not the sequence of the story.
localizations.code_2531: These are the correct numbers but not the sequence of the story.
localizations.code_2315: These are the correct numbers but not the sequence of the story.
localizations.code_2351: These are the correct numbers but not the sequence of the story.
localizations.code_7832: Alice heard a distant echo: "Wake-up!" Her sister was shaking her like an apple tree. "Oh, I had such a bizarre dream," said Alice; and she told her sister whatever she could remember of the strange adventures you just had.
localizations.code_7833: Alice heard a distant echo: "Wake-up!" Her sister was shaking her like an apple tree. "Oh, I had such a bizarre dream," said Alice; and she told her sister whatever she could remember of the strange adventures you just had.
localizations.code_1832: Alice heard a distant echo: "Wake-up!" Her sister was shaking her like an apple tree. "Oh, I had such a bizarre dream," said Alice; and she told her sister whatever she could remember of the strange adventures you just had.
localizations.code_1833: Alice heard a distant echo: "Wake-up!" Her sister was shaking her like an apple tree. "Oh, I had such a bizarre dream," said Alice; and she told her sister whatever she could remember of the strange adventures you just had.
localizations.code_3278: These are the correct numbers, but did you take a good look at the eyes of the Cheshire cat?
localizations.code_3378: These are the correct numbers, but did you take a good look at the eyes of the Cheshire cat?
localizations.code_3218: These are the correct numbers, but the cards depicting the kings must be facing down, and did you take a good look at the eyes of the Cheshire cat?
localizations.code_3318: These are the correct numbers, but the cards depicting the kings must be facing down, and did you take a good look at the eyes of the Cheshire cat?
localizations.code_2580: The rabbit talks to you: "Thank you for your help, you can keep the Queen's invitation to the crocket game. Her castle is that way, beyond the forest.
localizations.code_4761: A hit straight to the goal. The Queen of Hearts hissed: "If you have won, it is because you cheated! Executioner, take this young lady away!"
localizations.code_8476: A hit straight to the goal. The Queen of Hearts hissed: "If you have won, it is because you cheated! Executioner, take this young lady away!"
localizations.code_1674: Starting with the flag? You are doing it backwards.
localizations.code_6748: Starting with the flag? You are doing it backwards.
localizations.hint_1: There are 4 cards with a highlighted section. Put the highlighted sections in sequence so to make a sentence.
localizations.hint_4: As stated in the hidden letter, drinking will make you grow smaller. But what size do you want to grow to? Use the numeric rod.
localizations.hint_8: Fold the 6 cards that were put aside. Only 3 among them will be useful to retrace the hedgehog's trajectory. The latter starts on card 8, jumps over the orange obstacles and finishes at the flag's level.
localizations.hint_12_first: The back of this card looks really peculiar. Alice's feet are there but this is not the only difference with the front side.
localizations.hint_12: The difference between the numbers on the front and on the back is the key to Alice's feet.
localizations.hint_13: As stated in the hidden letter, eating will make you grow larger. But what size do you want to grow to? Use the numeric rod.
localizations.hint_15: Now that Alice has grown smaller, she can go through the tiny door.
localizations.hint_18: Using the fan could ventilate an entire room.
localizations.hint_23: This place could use a nice airflow. But what is missing?
localizations.hint_29: These three gardeners are on the back of another card.
localizations.hint_30: Enter this machine number and scan card 30 with your device. What do you see? The Exit sign looks like the back of a card…
localizations.hint_32: How can you take the T?
localizations.hint_33: These levels correspond to Alice's different sizes. Should you grow larger or smaller, add the modifier to the size to be reached.
localizations.hint_36: After you found the three accused, place them one on top of each other so to behead two of them.
localizations.hint_41_first: There are 4 cards with a highlighted section. Put the highlighted sections in sequence so to make a sentence.
localizations.hint_41: The clock's numeric representation of the minutes is the key. For example, for 5:40, the numeric representation is 8.
localizations.hint_49: And why wouldn't you look for a hedgehog on the back of the cards?
localizations.hint_53: All that is white is red… What else could you paint on the other card depicting the gardeners?
localizations.hint_54_first: Whatever the Queen is screaming sounds odd to you, three letters are missing from her alphabet.
localizations.hint_54: Take cards K, R, and Z. Then build the house of cards while following the instructions of both kings.
localizations.hint_65: After finding the three accused, place them on top of each other so to behead two of them.
localizations.hint_68: This key is shaped as a triangle, find the matching door.
localizations.hint_74: Alice should shrink to the smallest size so to go through the door.
localizations.hint_75: The missing part and the crumbs form a shape. Is it a hint for finding the culprit?
localizations.hint_82: Move through the labyrinth and find the Court. And don't forget, Alice is back to her right size.
localizations.hint_88: Look at the back of the cards still in the pack for the objects that appear only once. You can flip these cards over.
localizations.hint_89_first: Alice's feet point to that number. What is the difference with the front?
localizations.hint_89: The difference between the numbers on the front and the back is the key to finding Alice's feet.
localizations.hint_95: Use the measuring rod to reach the right size and grab the key. Also, you can spot a letter between the doors… the same letter is missing on the mat!
localizations.hint_111: Make a house of cards with the 6 foldable items while following the king's instructions. Make sure the kings' fronts are facing down, 9 of hearts and 8 of spades are to be used as reference points.
localizations.answer_hint_4: To go through the door, you need Alice to be very, very small. Use the smallest modifier on the rod (+11) and combine it with the potion (4).
localizations.answer_hint_8: Follow the drawing of card 8 using only foldable cards with orange obstacles. The ball first passes through the 4 of heart, then the 7 of heart, then the 6 of spades, and finally through hole 1.
localizations.answer_hint_12: Alice is missing something to get her feet back. The back of the card bears number 89, the front number 12. Substract 12 from 89.
localizations.answer_hint_13: Eat the biscuit (13) to grow taller and reach the adequate size. Place the rod next to the table with the key on top. The correct modifier is the highest one, +55.
localizations.answer_hint_23: As the caterpillar told you, you can find objects on the back of the cards, as long as the object you're looking for is unique. Such is the case with the fan which is on the back of card 18. Flip that card, then combine it with the room (23).
localizations.answer_hint_29: Remember, the caterpillar told you you can take a card from the deck if its back bears a unique object. In this case, the cards that the gardeners wear are on the back of a card.
localizations.answer_hint_32: When you say "tea", you can hear "T". Taking tea therefore means taking card T.
localizations.answer_hint_41: The order of the cards is D, then 1, then 41, and finally T. On the first card (D), the numeric representation of the minutes is 2, on the second is 5, then 8, and finally 0.
localizations.answer_hint_53: Help the gardeners and paint card 29 in red. Thus, you can combine it with this card (53).
localizations.answer_hint_65: You want to save Alice. She goes to the top. Then, place below the Jack and the last culprit so that their heads are hidden. Numbers 5 and a 4 appear then.
localizations.answer_hint_68: Look carefully at card 95. The bottom door is the only one with a triangular shaped lock. It's the right one, add the key (68) to the door's number (6).
localizations.answer_hint_74: To go through that door, first Alice needs to drink the potion (4) to reach the right size (card 15), then combine the latter with the door (74).
localizations.answer_hint_75: Placed one with the other, the backs of cards J and V form a heart, like the shape of the crumbs of the missing tart piece.
localizations.answer_hint_86: It's mostly gibberish… but you can hear a number clearly, many times. One.
localizations.answer_hint_88: There are several objects to be found, let's start with the mushroom. Look at the backs of the cards, and spot the unique mushroom, on card D.
localizations.answer_hint_89: Alice is missing something to get her feet back. The back of the card bears number 89, the front number 12. Substract 12 from 89.
localizations.machine_99: The trial is promptly carried out: the Jack of Hearts is declared guilty.
localizations.machine_77: Alice manages to escape through the roof and discovers a wonderful land. Turn the page to Chapter II.
localizations.machine30_hint_1: Move your device over the card. The Exit sign appears. It reminds you of another sign. Look for a similar card back and flip it.
localizations.machine30_hint_2: A yellow padlock appears so there is a code to solve.  The word EXIT shows you the color order. Trace the path in each color on the "This way" card to solve the code.
localizations.machine30_answer: Starting with green on the Start sign, trace an imaginary line connecting the green signs. You get a 5. Use the same process with the remaining colors while respecting the order in the EXIT word to get code 5210.
localizations.machine99_question_3: To expose him, how many differences?
localizations.machine99_question_4_4: To expose him, how many differences?
localizations.machine30_title:
What path
do you want to take?
